description_short: PayLattice is a payment orchestration platform that routes each transaction across 30+ PSPs, retries soft declines, and reconciles volume to one ledger.
description_long:
PayLattice sits between merchants and payment providers, routing each transaction to the best acquirer in real time. One integration reaches 30+ PSPs and local payment methods; the engine retries soft declines, balances volume across providers, and reconciles everything to a single ledger.

The company says smart routing and network tokens typically lift authorization rates by 2-5 points, with failover keeping checkout alive when a provider degrades. It is PCI Level 1 certified and was founded in 2023 by payments engineers from major PSPs.
